_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in determining the effect of various router and firewall configurations on traffic patterns and network performance in both LAN and WAN environments.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-014 (AI, cosine: 0.330), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.311).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.599). Shared vocabulary: [configurations, firewall, network, performance]. DCWF-only terms [determining, effect, environments, lan, patterns, router] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, data, design, dns] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.895, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 31-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Skill in determining the effect of various router and firewall configurations on" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 < STS 0.599 (gap -0.095). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [determining, effect, environments] and [affects, architecture, balancing] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [configurations, firewall, network, performance]. DCWF-only: [determining, effect, environments, lan, patterns, router]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, data, design, dns].
